semantic.role: Git command execution abstraction layer for the scanner engine, providing a testable interface and default synchronous implementation for running git subprocesses.
responsibilities: Define the ScannerGitClient interface that abstracts the execution of git commands.
Provide defaultScannerGitClient as a concrete implementation that invokes 'git' via child_process.execFileSync.
Enable testability by allowing mock or custom git command runners to replace the default.
outOfScope: Service orchestration or CLI command handling.
invariants: The module must remain independent of CLI entrypoints and service-level orchestration.
The interface method 'run' must always return the stdout as a string.
No mutable state is held in this module.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a minimal, replaceable git execution gateway for the scanner engine to keep git operations decoupled and testable.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Initial implementation as part of ArchSpine v1.0.0 architectural governance layer — establishes the git command boundary for the scanner.

publicSurface.description: Interface defining a 'run' method to execute git commands with given arguments and options, returning stdout. Consumed by scanner engine and test mocks.
Default implementation of ScannerGitClient that runs 'git' synchronously using child_process.execFileSync. Used directly by scanner engine components.
